title: Flamingo - Software update for just charge case
scenario: Verify that a software update can be performed for just the charging case without updating the headset via separate Update buttons in Device Settings
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen with the headset connected.
2. Tap the Update button on the device home screen.
3. Verify Device Settings opens with the Software Update tab expanded, showing an "Update All" button at the top and separate "Update" buttons for the headset and charging case.
4. Tap the "Update" button next to the charging case.
5. Complete the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process for the charging case.
expected: The DFU process completes for just the charging case. After the update, only the charging case is on the latest firmware; the headset firmware remains unchanged.
